info.title: Atlas REST API
info.summary: Structured civic research data for Atlas places, entities, sources, and discovery runs.
info.description: Atlas exposes place-first civic research data through a typed REST API. The public contract includes entities, sources, issue areas, domains, place profiles, issue signals, discovery runs, and anonymous data flags.

get.description:
Health check endpoint.

Returns
-------
dict[str, str]
    Simple status response.

post.description:
Submit a discount verification request.

Validates the submission and creates a verification record (initially PENDING).
All verifications require manual review.

Args:
    request: Verification request with segment, user_id, and segment-specific data
    response: FastAPI response object for setting headers

Returns:
    VerificationResponsePayload with status and message

Raises:
    HTTPException: If validation fails (400) or processing fails (500)

get.description:
List discount verification records (admin only).

Args:
    _status: Filter by status (pending, verified, rejected, expired)
    _segment: Filter by segment (independent_journalist, grassroots_nonprofit, civic_tech_worker)
    _response_obj: FastAPI response object for setting headers

Returns:
    VerificationListResponse with records and metadata

Raises:
    HTTPException: If admin access is denied (401) or processing fails (500)

patch.description:
Update a verification record status (admin only).

Args:
    _user_id: The user ID of the verification to update
    _request: New status and optional notes
    _response_obj: FastAPI response object for setting headers

Returns:
    VerificationUpdateResponse with updated status

Raises:
    HTTPException: If not found (404), unauthorized (401), or processing fails (500)

get.description: Search Atlas entities with text, geography, issue-area, entity-type, and source-type filters.

200.description: A paginated collection of Atlas entities.

post.description: Create a new Atlas entity using the canonical nested address and contact request shape.

get.description: Resolve a type + slug pair to a full entity detail response.
Return one Atlas entity with normalized contact, freshness, flag summary, and linked source provenance.

patch.description: Apply a partial update to an Atlas entity.

delete.description: Delete an Atlas entity by ID.

get.description: Return the source trail for one Atlas entity.

200.description: The source records linked to the requested entity.

post.description: Start an Atlas discovery pipeline run for a place and set of issue areas.

get.description: List Atlas discovery pipeline runs with optional state and status filters.

200.description: A paginated collection of discovery runs.

get.description: Return one Atlas discovery run by ID.

post.description: Submit an anonymous flag for an Atlas entity that looks stale or incorrect.

get.description: List anonymous flags that have been submitted for one Atlas entity.

200.description: A paginated collection of entity flags.

post.description: Submit an anonymous flag for an Atlas source record that looks stale or incorrect.

get.description: List anonymous flags that have been submitted for one Atlas source.

200.description: A paginated collection of source flags.

get.description: List top-level Atlas issue domains.

200.description: A paginated collection of Atlas domains.

get.description: Return a single Atlas domain and its issue areas.
List Atlas issue areas or resolve natural-language issue queries.

200.description: A paginated collection of Atlas issue areas.

get.description: Return one Atlas issue area by slug.
Return the canonical Atlas identity for a normalized place key.
List Atlas entities associated with one place, with optional issue-area, entity-type, source-type, and text filters.

200.description: A paginated collection of Atlas entities for the requested place.

get.description: List source records associated with one place, with optional issue-area, source-type, and text filters.

200.description: A paginated collection of Atlas sources for the requested place.

get.description: Return structured issue-area signals for one place based on Atlas entities and sources.

200.description: Issue-area signal summaries for the requested place.

get.description: Return Atlas coverage counts and gaps for one place.

200.description: Atlas coverage metadata for the requested place.

get.description: Return structured demographic and socioeconomic context for one place.

200.description: The Atlas place profile for the requested place.

get.description: List private entries owned by the org.

post.description: Create a private entry owned by the org.

get.description: Get a single private entry owned by the org.

put.description: Update a private entry owned by the org.

get.description: List annotations for the org, optionally filtered by entry_id.

post.description: Create an annotation on a shared entry.

put.description: Update an annotation (author or org admin/owner only).

delete.description: Delete an annotation (author or org admin/owner only).

get.description: List private discovery runs owned by the org.

post.description: Start a private discovery run for the org (record only, no pipeline execution).

get.description: Get details of a private discovery run owned by the org.
